data.summary: I graduated from Lehigh University with a BS in Computer Science, focusing on machine learning and logical reasoning systems. My research focused on improving learning-based approaches for reasoning tasks, resulting in a publication as lead author and presentation at an international conference. I have additional experience developing production software systems in collaborative engineering environments. I am a contingent hire at BasisPath who recently secured TS through the pipeline.

highlights: Resolved software bugs with full-stack solutions, enhancing efficiency and user interfaces using React.js and Next.js.
Built on-chain features with Blockchain ABIs, Solidity, and ENS integration; developed backend with Node.js, REST APIs, and Docker.
Facilitated daily engineering standup meetings and weekly team retrospectives.
Collaborated with engineering teams to develop a web app while gaining experience in web development workflows and best practices, including Git.
Participated in an off-site company summit with senior and executive-level leadership.
Developed machine learning models for efficient logical reasoning using Python, PyTorch, and NumPy, optimizing training and testing processes.
Converted OWL ontologies to Datalog format and implemented a dynamic training stop mechanism based on loss curves.
Published research as first and co-author, presented at the International Joint Conference on Rules and Reasoning.

data.institution: Lehigh University, P.C. Rossin College of Engineering & Applied Science

data.name: Capstone Project
highlights: Led a team to design and implement a full-stack web app, overcoming restricted code access to deliver a responsive, multi-device UI/UX using React.js, Node.js, and MongoDB.
Achieved seamless real-time data handling and testing integration while adhering to sponsor requirements in a challenging environment.

data.name: Best Use of a Google Product
highlights: Created a mobile application that allows users to either take a photo of their food, a nutrition label, or paste a recipe in and receive a grade on how sustainably they are eating leveraging Google Cloud Vision and Flutter.

data.name: Query Optimization of Backward-Chaining Reasoning with Learned Heuristics
data.venue: Proceedings of the Rule Challenge, Doctoral Consortium, Industry Track, and Networking Session 2024

data.name: Lehigh Cybersecurity Club
highlights: Facilitated board meetings, created presentations, and educated students on cybersecurity topics like web exploitation, password cracking, and Linux basics.
Coordinated club meetings with guest security professionals.
